zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bohun於大約1420年5月6日出生在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德時，他的父親John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst57歲，母親Anne Joan Halsham37歲。他與Alice Dalingridge結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1502年7月19日在他的家鄉享年82歲。

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bohun was born about 6 May 1420, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, his father, John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst, was 57 and his mother, Anne Joan Halsham, was 37. He married Alice Dalingridge. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 19 July 1502, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bohun est né environ 6 mai 1420, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Anne Joan Halsham, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Alice Dalingridge. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1502, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bohun um 6. Mai 1420 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst 57 und seine Mutter Anne Joan Halsham 37. Er hat Alice Dalingridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 19. Juli 1502 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bohun è nato il circa 6 maggio 1420 nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Anne Joan Halsham, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Alice Dalingridge. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 19 luglio 1502, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bohunが約1420年5月6日にイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで生まれた時，父John de Bohun II,   of Midhurstは57歳，母Anne Joan Halshamは37歳であった。Alice Dalingridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1502年7月19日に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bohun(이)가 대략 1420년 5월 6일 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Joan Halsham(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Alice Dalingridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1502년 7월 19일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.about 6 May 1420–19 July 1502: aproximadamente 6 de maio de 1420–19 de julho de 1502
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bohun nasceu aproximadamente 6 de maio de 1420, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Anne Joan Halsham, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Dalingridge. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1502, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bohun родился около 6 мая 1420 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Joan Halsham, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Dalingridge. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 19 июля 1502 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.

Se casó con Alice Dalingridge. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 19 de julio de 1502, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años.
